action.reasoning: Observation: Previous DDP attempts failed with DistNetworkError (socket timeout) during rendezvous. Analysis: DDP requires torchrun and inter-process communication that timed out due to DNS/network restrictions. Decision: Switch to DataParallel to avoid rendezvous and use all 4 GPUs. Write complete train.py with DataParallel, class weights, mixed precision, validation macro-F1, and logging to metrics.jsonl. Run 2 epochs on 5% data to validate pipeline and submit eval for baseline score and iteration time measurement.
